title: Welcome to Tateyama Base!
overview: A Named Valkyrie shouldering a tragic history is reassigned to a base in Japan. But if anyone can break her curse, it's the quirky people of this strange base.

title: Umihotaru Sea Assault!
overview: As Claudia settles in and meets the crew, a Pillar appears and forces the base to scramble. Problem is, there's no way to reach it without some stunt flying.

title: Disaster Recovery Assessment!
overview: The Valkyries revisit Umihotaru to check on the battle's aftermath. However, the damage done is much closer to home.

title: Tateyama Castle Swimsuit Skirmish!
overview: When there's a Pillar between them and their planes, the Valkyries get help from scantily-clad men to sneak them back to base.

title: Tateyama Joint Forces!
overview: There's a new Valkyrie in town who has history with Sonoka. With her arrival comes news of a counteroffensive that hopes to liberate Japan.

title: Fuji Pillar Assault!
overview: After Yayoi sheds light on her dilemma, the world's best descend upon Mount Fuji. Though the battle begins well, nobody is prepared for what happens.

title: Fuji Pillar Retreat!
overview: Everyone scrambles for their lives when things take a turn for the worse.

title: Exploring a Mythical World!
overview: Ichiro works with tattered troops in a race against time. Meanwhile, the others look in a hidden world for a hint to turn the tides.

title: Retaking Tateyama Air Base!
overview: As enemies close in from all sides, the crew in Valhalla run for their lives and Sonoka faces her fear of the sky.

title: The Eve Before the Battle of Tateyama Bay!
overview: Odin's declaration of war forces humanity into one last, great battle. But before it begins, Miyako rallies Tateyama to hold a special event.

title: Reattacking Fuji Pillar!
overview: Humanity soars into battle for the decisive showdown. Though Azuzu's strategy impresses Odin, she's not the only one with surprises in store.

title: Welcome to Tateyama Base!!
overview: In the climactic battle between humanity and god, Odin himself enters the fray. Both sides pull out all the stops as they struggle for survival.
